prompt: Design a graphic for 'Authentic Voice'. The text should have a distressed vintage letterpress appearance, using deep black ink with subtle bleed and a noticeable debossed texture on the paper. This is set on a high-quality, thick cream paper with visible fiber texture and a soft vignette, emphasizing a classic, handcrafted branding feel.
prompt_refined: Generate an image featuring the phrase "Authentic Voice." The text should be rendered in a distressed vintage letterpress style with deep black ink, showing subtle bleed and a distinct debossed texture. It should be centered on a thick, high-quality cream paper, exhibiting visible fiber texture and framed by a soft vignette. The overall image should evoke a classic, handcrafted branding feel.
objects: Visible paper fiber texture on paper
